section_name: Record of Stolen or Concealed Motor Vehicle
text:
(a) The department shall:

(1) make a record of each report to the department that a motor vehicle registered in this state has been stolen or concealed in violation of Section 32.33 (Hindering Secured Creditors) , Penal Code; and

(2) note the fact of the report in the department’s records.

(b) A person who reports a motor vehicle as stolen or concealed under Subsection (a) shall notify the department promptly if the vehicle is recovered, and the department shall change its records accordingly.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 501. Certificate of Title Act
##### § 501.135 — Record of Stolen or Concealed Motor Vehicle

(a) The department shall:

    (1) make a record of each report to the department that a motor vehicle registered in this state has been stolen or concealed in violation of Section 32.33 (Hindering Secured Creditors) , Penal Code; and

    (2) note the fact of the report in the department’s records.

(b) A person who reports a motor vehicle as stolen or concealed under Subsection (a) shall notify the department promptly if the vehicle is recovered, and the department shall change its records accordingly.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B.2357), Sec. 57, eff. January 1, 2012.*
